content: Per la prossima lezione, voglio che trascriviate il testo di una canzone di qualsiasi cantante, purché sia in inglese.
credits: Sentence from Tatoeba by Guybrush88 (CC-BY 2.0 FR)
relationships: eng:For the next class, I want you to transcribe the lyrics from a song by any singer as long as it's in English
